verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidi : et ecce in firmamento quod erat super caput cherubim, quasi lapis sapphirus, quasi species similitudinis solii, apparuit super ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶרְאֶ֗ה וְהִנֵּ֤ה אֶל־הָרָקִ֙יעַ֙ אֲשֶׁר֙ עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ הַכְּרֻבִ֔ים כְּאֶ֣בֶן סַפִּ֔יר כְּמַרְאֵ֖ה דְּמ֣וּת כִּסֵּ֑א נִרְאָ֖ה עֲלֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I saw and behold in the firmament that was over the heads of the cherubims, there appeared over them as it were the sapphire stone, as the appearance of the likeness of a throne.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä näin, ja katso, taivaassa oli Kerubimin päällä niinkuin saphir, ja niiden päällä niinkuin istuin.
verses.king_james: Then I looked, and, behold, in the firmament that was above the head of the cherubims there appeared over them as it were a sapphire stone, as the appearance of the likeness of a throne.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit ad virum qui indutus erat lineis, et ait : Ingredere in medio rotarum quæ sunt subtus cherubim, et imple manum tuam prunis ignis quæ sunt inter cherubim, et effunde super civitatem. Ingressusque est in conspectu meo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֜אמֶר אֶל־הָאִ֣ישׁ ׀ לְבֻ֣שׁ הַבַּדִּ֗ים וַיֹּ֡אמֶר בֹּא֩ אֶל־בֵּינ֨וֹת לַגַּלְגַּ֜ל אֶל־תַּ֣חַת לַכְּר֗וּב וּמַלֵּ֨א חׇפְנֶ֤יךָ גַֽחֲלֵי־אֵשׁ֙ מִבֵּינ֣וֹת לַכְּרֻבִ֔ים וּזְרֹ֖ק עַל־הָעִ֑יר וַיָּבֹ֖א לְעֵינָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he spoke to the man, that was clothed with linen, and said: Go in between the wheels that are under the cherubims and fill thy hand with the coals of fire that are between the cherubims, and pour them out upon the city. And he went in, in my sight:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän sanoi sille miehelle, joka oli liinavaatteissa: mene sisälle ratasten välille Kerubimin aalle, ja ota kätes täyteen tulisia hiiliä, jotka Kerubimin välillä ovat, ja hajoita ne kaupungin päälle; ja hän meni sisälle minun silmäini edessä.
verses.king_james: And he spake unto the man clothed with linen, and said, Go in between the wheels, even under the cherub, and fill thine hand with coals of fire from between the cherubims, and scatter them over the city. And he went in in my sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cherubim autem stabant a dextris domus cum ingrederetur vir, et nubes implevit atrium interius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַכְּרֻבִ֗ים עֹ֥מְדִ֛ים מִימִ֥ין לַבַּ֖יִת בְּבֹא֣וֹ הָאִ֑ישׁ וְהֶעָנָ֣ן מָלֵ֔א אֶת־הֶחָצֵ֖ר הַפְּנִימִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the cherubims stood on the right side of the house, when the man went in, and a cloud filled the inner court.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Kerubimit seisoivat oikialla puolella huoneessa, kuin mies sisälle meni, ja sumu täytti sisällisen kartanon.
verses.king_james: Now the cherubims stood on the right side of the house, when the man went in; and the cloud filled the inner court.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et elevata est gloria Domini desuper cherub ad limen domus : et repleta est domus nube, et atrium repletum est splendore gloriæ Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤רׇם כְּבוֹד־יְהֹוָה֙ מֵעַ֣ל הַכְּר֔וּב עַ֖ל מִפְתַּ֣ן הַבָּ֑יִת וַיִּמָּלֵ֤א הַבַּ֙יִת֙ אֶת־הֶ֣עָנָ֔ן וְהֶֽחָצֵר֙ מָֽלְאָ֔ה אֶת־נֹ֖גַהּ כְּב֥וֹד יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the glory of the Lord was lifted up from above the cherub to the threshold of the house: and the house was filled with the cloud, and the court was filled with the brightness of the glory of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran kunnia nousi Kerubimin päältä huoneen kynnykseen asti, ja huone täytettiin sumulla ja kartano Herran kunnian kirkkaudella.
verses.king_james: Then the glory of the Lord went up from the cherub, and stood over the threshold of the house; and the house was filled with the cloud, and the court was full of the brightness of the Lord’s glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sonitus alarum cherubim audiebatur usque ad atrium exterius, quasi vox Dei omnipotentis loquentis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקוֹל֙ כַּנְפֵ֣י הַכְּרוּבִ֔ים נִשְׁמַ֕ע עַד־הֶחָצֵ֖ר הַחִֽיצֹנָ֑ה כְּק֥וֹל אֵל־שַׁדַּ֖י בְּדַבְּרֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the sound of the wings of the cherubims was heard even to the outward court as the voice of God Almighty speaking.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kerubimin siipein humaus kuului hamaan ulkonaiseen kartanoon asti, niinkuin kaikkivaltiaan Jumalan ääni kuin hän puhuu.
verses.king_james: And the sound of the cherubims’ wings was heard even to the outer court, as the voice of the Almighty God when he speaketh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque præcepisset viro qui indutus erat lineis, dicens : Sume ignem de medio rotarum quæ sunt inter cherubim : ingressus ille stetit juxta rotam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י בְּצַוֺּתוֹ֙ אֶת־הָאִ֤ישׁ לְבֻֽשׁ־הַבַּדִּים֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר קַ֥ח אֵשׁ֙ מִבֵּינ֣וֹת לַגַּלְגַּ֔ל מִבֵּינ֖וֹת לַכְּרוּבִ֑ים וַיָּבֹא֙ וַֽיַּעֲמֹ֔ד אֵ֖צֶל הָאוֹפָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had commanded the man that was clothed with linen, saying: Take fire from the midst of the wheels that are between the cherubims: he went in and stood beside the wheel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin hän oli käskenyt miestä, joka oli liinavaatteissa, ja sanonut: ota tulta ratasten keskeltä Kerubimin alta; niin hän meni sinne sisälle, ja astui rattaan tykö.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass, that when he had commanded the man clothed with linen, saying, Take fire from between the wheels, from between the cherubims; then he went in, and stood beside the wheels.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et extendit cherub manum de medio cherubim ad ignem qui erat inter cherubim, et sumpsit, et dedit in manus ejus qui indutus erat lineis : qui accipiens egressus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַח֩ הַכְּר֨וּב אֶת־יָד֜וֹ מִבֵּינ֣וֹת לַכְּרוּבִ֗ים אֶל־הָאֵשׁ֙ אֲשֶׁר֙ בֵּינ֣וֹת הַכְּרֻבִ֔ים וַיִּשָּׂא֙ וַיִּתֵּ֔ן אֶל־חׇפְנֵ֖י לְבֻ֣שׁ הַבַּדִּ֑ים וַיִּקַּ֖ח וַיֵּצֵֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And one cherub stretched out his arm from the midst of the cherubims to the fire that was between the cherubims: and he took, and put it into the hands of him that was clothed with linen: who took it and went forth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kerubim ojensi kätensä keskellä Kerubimeja, tuleen päin, joka oli Kerubimin välillä, otti siitä ja antoi sen miehen käsiin, joka oli liinavaatteissa; ja hän otti sen ja meni ulos.
verses.king_james: And one cherub stretched forth his hand from between the cherubims unto the fire that was between the cherubims, and took thereof, and put it into the hands of him that was clothed with linen: who took it, and went out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et apparuit in cherubim similitudo manus hominis subtus pennas eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּרָ֖א לַכְּרֻבִ֑ים תַּבְנִית֙ יַד־אָדָ֔ם תַּ֖חַת כַּנְפֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there appeared in the cherubims the likeness of a man's hand under their wings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja näkyi Kerubimeissa, niikuin ihmisen käsi heidän siipeinsä alla.
verses.king_james: And there appeared in the cherubims the form of a man’s hand under their wings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et vidi : et ecce quatuor rotæ juxta cherubim : rota una juxta cherub unum, et rota alia juxta cherub unum : species autem rotarum erat quasi visio lapidis chrysolithi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶרְאֶ֗ה וְהִנֵּ֨ה אַרְבָּעָ֣ה אוֹפַנִּים֮ אֵ֣צֶל הַכְּרוּבִים֒ אוֹפַ֣ן אֶחָ֗ד אֵ֚צֶל הַכְּר֣וּב אֶחָ֔ד וְאוֹפַ֣ן אֶחָ֔ד אֵ֖צֶל הַכְּר֣וּב אֶחָ֑ד וּמַרְאֵה֙ הָא֣וֹפַנִּ֔ים כְּעֵ֖ין אֶ֥בֶן תַּרְשִֽׁישׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I saw, and behold there were four wheels by the cherubims: one wheel by one cherub, and another wheel by another cherub: and the appearance of the wheels was to the sight like the chrysolite stone:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä näin, ja katso, neljät rattaat seisoivat Kerubimein tykönä, jokaisen Kerubimin tykönä yhdet rattaat, ja rattaat olivat näköänsä niinkuin turkos.
verses.king_james: And when I looked, behold the four wheels by the cherubims, one wheel by one cherub, and another wheel by another cherub: and the appearance of the wheels was as the colour of a beryl stone.

verses.latin_vulgate: et aspectus earum similitudo una quatuor, quasi sit rota in medio rotæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַ֨רְאֵיהֶ֔ם דְּמ֥וּת אֶחָ֖ד לְאַרְבַּעְתָּ֑ם כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר יִהְיֶ֥ה הָאוֹפַ֖ן בְּת֥וֹךְ הָאוֹפָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And as to their appearance, all four were alike: as if a wheel were in the midst of a wheel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olivat kaikki ne neljä yksi niinkuin toinenkin, niinkuin yhdet rattaat olisivat olleet toisten sisällä.
verses.king_james: And as for their appearances, they four had one likeness, as if a wheel had been in the midst of a wheel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque ambularent, in quatuor partes gradiebantur, et non revertebantur ambulantes : sed ad locum ad quem ire declinabat quæ prima erat, sequebantur et ceteræ, nec convertebantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּלֶכְתָּ֗ם אֶל־אַרְבַּ֤עַת רִבְעֵיהֶם֙ יֵלֵ֔כוּ לֹ֥א יִסַּ֖בּוּ בְּלֶכְתָּ֑ם כִּ֣י הַמָּק֞וֹם אֲשֶׁר־יִפְנֶ֤ה הָרֹאשׁ֙ אַחֲרָ֣יו יֵלֵ֔כוּ לֹ֥א יִסַּ֖בּוּ בְּלֶכְתָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they went, they went by four ways: and they turned not when they went: but to the place whither they first turned, the rest also followed, and did not turn back.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin yksi heistä meni, niin menivät kaikki neljä, ja ei erinneet toinen toisestansa kulkeissansa; mutta kuhunka ensimmäinen meni, sinne menivät ne jälissä, ja ei erinneet toinen toisestansa.
verses.king_james: When they went, they went upon their four sides; they turned not as they went, but to the place whither the head looked they followed it; they turned not as they went.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et omne corpus earum, et colla, et manus, et pennæ, et circuli, plena erant oculis in circuitu quatuor rotarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־בְּשָׂרָם֙ וְגַבֵּהֶ֔ם וִידֵיהֶ֖ם וְכַנְפֵיהֶ֑ם וְהָאוֹפַנִּ֗ים מְלֵאִ֤ים עֵינַ֙יִם֙ סָבִ֔יב לְאַרְבַּעְתָּ֖ם אוֹפַנֵּיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And their whole body, and their necks, and their hands, and their wings, and the circles were full of eyes, round about the four wheels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja heidän koko ruumiinsa, selkänsä, kätensä ja siipensä, niin myös rattaat olivat täynnä silmiä kaikki ympärinsä, ne neljät rattaat.
verses.king_james: And their whole body, and their backs, and their hands, and their wings, and the wheels, were full of eyes round about, even the wheels that they four had.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et rotas istas vocavit volubiles, audiente me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָא֖וֹפַנִּ֑ים לָהֶ֛ם קוֹרָ֥א הַגַּלְגַּ֖ל בְּאׇזְנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And these wheels he called voluble, in my hearing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rattaille sanottiin: pyörikäät, niin että minä sen kuulin.
verses.king_james: As for the wheels, it was cried unto them in my hearing, O wheel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quatuor autem facies habebat unum : facies una, facies cherub, et facies secunda, facies hominis : et in tertio facies leonis, et in quarto facies aquilæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְבָּעָ֥ה פָנִ֖ים לְאֶחָ֑ד פְּנֵ֨י הָאֶחָ֜ד פְּנֵ֣י הַכְּר֗וּב וּפְנֵ֤י הַשֵּׁנִי֙ פְּנֵ֣י אָדָ֔ם וְהַשְּׁלִישִׁי֙ פְּנֵ֣י אַרְיֵ֔ה וְהָרְבִיעִ֖י פְּנֵי־נָֽשֶׁר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And every one had four faces: one face was the face of a cherub, and the second face, the face of a man: and in the third was the face of a lion: and in the fourth the face of an eagle.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin oli myös jokaisella eläimellä neljät kasvot: yhdet kasvot olivat ihmisen kasvot, toiset kasvot olivat ihmisen kasvot, kolmannet jalopeuran kasvot, ja neljännet kotkan kasvot.
verses.king_james: And every one had four faces: the first face was the face of a cherub, and the second face was the face of a man, and the third the face of a lion, and the fourth the face of an eagle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et elevata sunt cherubim : ipsum est animal quod videram juxta fluvium Chobar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּרֹ֖מּוּ הַכְּרוּבִ֑ים הִ֣יא הַחַיָּ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר רָאִ֖יתִי בִּֽנְהַר־כְּבָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the cherubims were lifted up: this is the living creature that I had seen by the river Chobar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Kerubimit korotettiin. Tämä on se eläin, jonka minä näin Kebarin virran tykönä.
verses.king_james: And the cherubims were lifted up. This is the living creature that I saw by the river of Chebar.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque ambularent cherubim, ibant pariter et rotæ juxta ea : et cum elevarent cherubim alas suas ut exaltarentur de terra, non residebant rotæ, sed et ipsæ juxta erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְלֶ֙כֶת֙ הַכְּרוּבִ֔ים יֵלְכ֥וּ הָאוֹפַנִּ֖ים אֶצְלָ֑ם וּבִשְׂאֵ֨ת הַכְּרוּבִ֜ים אֶת־כַּנְפֵיהֶ֗ם לָרוּם֙ מֵעַ֣ל הָאָ֔רֶץ לֹֽא־יִסַּ֧בּוּ הָאוֹפַנִּ֛ים גַּם־הֵ֖ם מֵאֶצְלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when the cherubims went, the wheels also went by them: and when the cherubims lifted up their wings, to mount up from the earth, the wheels stayed not behind, but were by them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin Kerubimit kävivät, niin kulkivat myös rattaat heitä myöten; ja kuin Kerubimit nostivat siipiänsä, maasta nousemaan, niin ei myös rattaat heistä erinneet.
verses.king_james: And when the cherubims went, the wheels went by them: and when the cherubims lifted up their wings to mount up from the earth, the same wheels also turned not from beside them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Stantibus illis stabant, et cum elevatis elevabantur : spiritus enim vitæ erat in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּעׇמְדָ֣ם יַעֲמֹ֔דוּ וּבְרוֹמָ֖ם יֵר֣וֹמּוּ אוֹתָ֑ם כִּ֛י ר֥וּחַ הַחַיָּ֖ה בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: When they stood, these stood: and when they were lifted up, these were lifted up: for the spirit of life was in them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin he seisoivat, niin seisoivat nämät myös, kuin he nousivat, niin nousivat myös nämät; sillä elävä henki oli heissä.
verses.king_james: When they stood, these stood; and when they were lifted up, these lifted up themselves also: for the spirit of the living creature was in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et egressa est gloria Domini a limine templi, et stetit super cherubim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵא֙ כְּב֣וֹד יְהֹוָ֔ה מֵעַ֖ל מִפְתַּ֣ן הַבָּ֑יִת וַֽיַּעֲמֹ֖ד עַל־הַכְּרוּבִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the glory of the Lord went forth from the threshold of the temple: and stood over the cherubims.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herran kunnia meni taas huoneen kynnykseltä, ja istui Kerubimein päälle.
verses.king_james: Then the glory of the Lord departed from off the threshold of the house, and stood over the cherubims.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et elevantia cherubim alas suas, exaltata sunt a terra coram me : et illis egredientibus, rotæ quoque subsecutæ sunt : et stetit in introitu portæ domus Domini orientalis, et gloria Dei Israël erat super ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׂא֣וּ הַכְּרוּבִ֣ים אֶת־כַּ֠נְפֵיהֶ֠ם וַיֵּר֨וֹמּוּ מִן־הָאָ֤רֶץ לְעֵינַי֙ בְּצֵאתָ֔ם וְהָאוֹפַנִּ֖ים לְעֻמָּתָ֑ם וַֽיַּעֲמֹ֗ד פֶּ֣תַח שַׁ֤עַר בֵּית־יְהֹוָה֙ הַקַּדְמוֹנִ֔י וּכְב֧וֹד אֱלֹהֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם מִלְמָֽעְלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the cherubims lifting up their wings, were raised from the earth before me: and as they went out, the wheels also followed: and it stood in the entry of the east gate of the house of the Lord: and the glory of the God of Israel was over them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ylentelivät Kerubimit siipiänsä, ja nousivat maasta ylös, minun silmäini edessä; ja kuin he menivät ulos, menivät rattaat heitä myöten; ja he astuivat idän puoleiselle ovelle Herran huonetta, ja Israelin kunnia oli heidän päällänsä.
verses.king_james: And the cherubims lifted up their wings, and mounted up from the earth in my sight: when they went out, the wheels also were beside them, and every one stood at the door of the east gate of the Lord’s house; and the glory of the God of Israel was over them above.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipsum est animal quod vidi subter Deum Israël juxta fluvium Chobar, et intellexi quia cherubim essent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִ֣יא הַחַיָּ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר רָאִ֛יתִי תַּ֥חַת אֱלֹהֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בִּֽנְהַר־כְּבָ֑ר וָאֵדַ֕ע כִּ֥י כְרוּבִ֖ים הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: This is the living creature, which I saw under the God of Israel by the river Chobar: and I understood that they were cherubims.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on se eläin, jonka minä näin Israelin Jumalan alla Kebarin virran tykönä; ja minä tunsin ne olevan Kerubimit.
verses.king_james: This is the living creature that I saw under the God of Israel by the river of Chebar; and I knew that they were the cherubims.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quatuor vultus uni, et quatuor alæ uni : et similitudo manus hominis sub alis eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַרְבָּעָ֨ה אַרְבָּעָ֤ה פָנִים֙ לְאֶחָ֔ד וְאַרְבַּ֥ע כְּנָפַ֖יִם לְאֶחָ֑ד וּדְמוּת֙ יְדֵ֣י אָדָ֔ם תַּ֖חַת כַּנְפֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Each one had four faces, and each one had four wings: and the likeness of a man's hand was under their wings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jokaisella olivat neljät kasvot ja neljä siipeä, ja siipein alla niinkuin ihmisen kädet.
verses.king_james: Every one had four faces apiece, and every one four wings; and the likeness of the hands of a man was under their wings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et similitudo vultuum eorum, ipsi vultus quos videram juxta fluvium Chobar, et intuitus eorum, et impetus singulorum ante faciem suam ingredi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּדְמ֣וּת פְּנֵיהֶ֔ם הֵ֣מָּה הַפָּנִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֤ר רָאִ֙יתִי֙ עַל־נְהַר־כְּבָ֔ר מַרְאֵיהֶ֖ם וְאוֹתָ֑ם אִ֛ישׁ אֶל־עֵ֥בֶר פָּנָ֖יו יֵלֵֽכוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And as to the likeness of their faces, they were the same faces which I had seen by the river Chobar, and their looks, and the impulse of every one to go straight forward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän kasvonsa olivat niinkuin minä ne näin Kebarin virran tykönä; ja ne kukin kävivät kohdastansa eteensä päin.
verses.king_james: And the likeness of their faces was the same faces which I saw by the river of Chebar, their appearances and themselves: they went every one straight forward.
